ethercat.description: EtherCAT Pin Configuration for US Machine

device.name: DigitalIO
device.description: XHS ECT 16DI/16DO — pysoem reports GroupType DigitalIO (not XML type string)

outputs.comment: DO0–DO15 on XHS_ECT_MD1616_V2.0. DO0–DO5 pneumatic valves (sinking to GND). DO6–DO15 unassigned.

CLAMP_RIGHT.description: Clamp Right — enabled: close, disabled: open

CLAMP_LEFT.description: Clamp Left — enabled: close, disabled: open

LEVER_UP.description: Lever Up — enabled: up, disabled: down

PP_CLAMP.description: Pick & Place Clamp — enabled: close, disabled: open

MAIN_AIR.description: Main Air Pressure Valve — enabled: on, disabled: off

inputs.comment: DI0 Initialization, DI1 Start (24V → input, pressed = 1). DI2–DI15 unassigned.

INIT_BUTTON.description: Panel Initialization button — 24V to DI0, pressed = 1

START_BUTTON.description: Panel Start button — 24V to DI1, pressed = 1 — triggers production sequence

notes: device.name must match pysoem slave.name (here: DigitalIO). Hardware is XHS_ECT_MD1616 per XML.
NIC: Realtek RTL8152 USB 10/100 → use eth1; built-in Pi Ethernet is typically eth0
DI0 INIT_BUTTON → initialization. DI1 START_BUTTON → production sequence.
Init (DI0): DO0–DO3 off, DO4 on. DO5 main air ON at EtherCAT connect and after every pneumatics write; OFF only on emergency stop.
